_comment: Configurable Chance and Community Chest card decks for Endsieg. Edit freely — changes take effect on the next server restart. Remove or add entries as needed. The full set of supported actions is listed in _schema.

_schema.text: Message displayed in the event log when the card is drawn.
_schema.target: Tile id to move to — used with 'advance_to'.

_actions.pay: Player pays 'amount' to the bank (goes to Free Parking pool when Vacation Cash rule is on).
_actions.advance_to: Move player to tile 'target'; collect $200 if passing GO.
_actions.move_back: Move player back 'amount' spaces (can trigger the new tile's effect).
_actions.nearest_railroad: Advance to the nearest railroad tile; collect $200 if passing GO.
_actions.jail_free: Player receives a Get Out of Jail Free card (stored for future use).
_actions.pay_each: Player pays 'amount' to every other active player.
_actions.collect_each: Player collects 'amount' from every other active player.

chanceCards.text: You are an American taxpayer and Trump launched Operation epic fury. Pay $300 for the war effort.

chestCards.text: You picked up $20 from the floor.
Your mom's funeral. Collect $25 from every player.
